name: Podnabu
short_description: You are a summoned hero in Podnabu, travelling the world, solving various puzzles and exterminating the undead on your way. At the same time trying to find out why you were summoned here and what the people of this world want from you.
detailed_description:
Wake up in the medieval fantasy world of Podnabu! You are the guardian of a magical sword. Fight against hordes of skeletons and monsters. Solve mysteries and become a real hero!
Many wanderers have fallen into the tangled secrets of this world, remaining in the dark even after death. But perhaps it is you who can uncover the true essence of this world.
Explore mysterious dungeons and a flying city, unravel ancient secrets and become a true hero! Ready to take on the challenge? Go on to adventure and glory!

In the marvellous RPG world awaits you :
-Photorealistic environment
-Open world
-Customisation of your weapons
-Old, abandoned castles
-Deep caves with various riddles and mysteries
-NPCs with unique dialogues
-Epic battles with various mobs
-Non linear plot


-The story, full of unexpected twists and turns and deep characters, will not leave you indifferent.
-Sound accompaniment complements the picture, immersing you in the atmosphere of what is happening.
-Gameplay offers plenty of opportunities to explore and interact with the world.
-Enjoy stunning views and detailed locations that will make you believe in the reality of this fantastic world.
